message:
🐛 Widen fullscreen mission chat area (#133)

* ✨ Add Resolution Memory System for AI Missions

- Add useResolutions hook for localStorage persistence of resolutions
- Add ResolutionKnowledgePanel showing related past resolutions in fullscreen mode
- Add SaveResolutionDialog for saving successful mission resolutions
- Add conversational completion flow asking if mission was helpful
- Add issue signature detection for common K8s issues (CrashLoopBackOff, OOMKilled, etc.)
- Add effectiveness tracking (times used, success rate)
- Support both personal and org-shared resolutions
- Add Playwright tests for Resolution Memory System
- Update CLAUDE.md with mandatory testing requirements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Widen chat area in fullscreen mission view

Remove max-width constraints on the chat column so it fills
all available space between the Related Knowledge and Summary panels.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
